docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOHAMMADI, SEPIDEH ,AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN, RYAN ,AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOHAMMADI, SEPIDEH ,AN INDIVIDUAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN, RYAN ,AN INDIVIDUAL $36,135.92 PRINCIPAL, $319.61 INTEREST, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $36,890.53, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
